title: T1-vs-T2 rev2 operator selection comparison memo (comparison only; does NOT ratify T1 or T2; does NOT author any candidate; preserves 5376de7 as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED; recommends one of: RATIFY_T1_PRIMARY / RATIFY_T2_PRIMARY / RATIFY_T1_AND_T2_CO_PRIMARY / HALT_OR_DEFER)
report_kind: Operator selection comparison memo: compares T1 rev2 micro-futures basket vs T2 rev2 cash-equity basket under DR10 v2 framework; evaluates advantages and risks of each; provides decision matrix across K9 reachability, DR10 v2 reachability, data friction, operational meaningfulness, framework integrity, expected diagnostic value; recommends one ratification path. Does NOT ratify any candidate; does NOT author any DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD; does NOT compute correlations, A7, effective_independent_bets, or any signal; does NOT fetch data; does NOT modify any sealed or candidate artifact; preserves 5376de7 byte-stable as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED per supplement 7d7bb52.

comparison_scope.comparison_framework: DR10 v2 AND-conjunction + governance supplement caveats

provisional_status_of_5376de7.source_of_status: next-track rev2 governance supplement at 7d7bb52, section 6 (treatment_of_5376de7): rollback NOT authorized; treated_as_fully_operator_ratified=False; status PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED
provisional_status_of_5376de7.implication: 5376de7 PLAN is preserved byte-stable in repo as a structurally legitimate PLAN-only artifact. The autonomous-session implicit selection of T1 over T2 is NOT operator-ratified. Selection between T1 and T2 (or co-primary or halt) requires explicit operator-typed phrase per supplement 7d7bb52 section 7.

t1_rev2_advantages.futures_continuity: Reuses sealed MNQ.c.0 CSV (anchor sha 8b7b832c…23e) for 1 of 4 instruments. Existing s13-d1 lineage data scope partially amortizes the fresh-fetch burden — only MES, MYM, M2K require fresh Databento fetch + DR9 audit.
t1_rev2_advantages.existing_mnq_lineage: RSI(2) bi-directional on MNQ.c.0 was already executed at s13-d1 P3 BUILD + P6 IS (159 trades / 4.63y; expectancy $540.73; sharpe_proxy 0.1076) — mechanic-on-MNQ behavior is well-characterized; only DR10 v1 OR-rule blocked the lineage from advancing. T1 rev2 retains that proven mechanic on a broader universe.
t1_rev2_advantages.multi_instrument_rsi_2: Multi-instrument bi-directional RSI(2) on 4 correlated equity-index micros: at PLAN-time linear extrapolation, expected ~136 trades/y portfolio (4 × ~34/y per instrument from s13-d1 baseline). Mechanic is empirically supported by s13-d1's in-sample diagnostic; per-instrument trade density is known.
t1_rev2_advantages.k9_potential: Even if A7 effective_independent_bets is conservatively 1.5-2 (typical for normal-regime equity-index basket), effective trade count is 51-68/y portfolio — still clears K9 OOS (>=50/y) at the high end and clears K9 IS (>=21.74/y) comfortably. K9 OOS margin is borderline-but-positive after A7 adjustment.
t1_rev2_advantages.dr10_v2_cost_drag_status_under_da4_c_200: If DA4=C $200k were chosen (matching s13-d1's start_cash) instead of DA4=B $100k, cost_drag would be ~2.35% (s13-d1 observed value) — comfortably below 5% threshold. DA4 choice moves T1 from borderline to comfortable on DR10 v2.
t1_rev2_advantages.framework_continuity_advantage: T1 exercises the same DR/K-gate ladder that s13-d1 exercised, with universe and DA4 as the orthogonal axes. Lineage continuity makes regression analysis cleaner.

t1_rev2_risks.high_correlation_across_4_micros: MNQ (Nasdaq-100 micro), MES (S&P-500 micro), MYM (Dow-30 micro), M2K (Russell-2000 micro) are all US equity-index micro-futures. Pairwise realized return correlations in normal regimes typically exceed 0.90-0.95; in stress regimes correlations converge toward 1.0. RSI(2) signal alignment across these 4 instruments is therefore strongly correlated rather than independent.
t1_rev2_risks.effective_independent_bets_likely_far_be: A7 effective_independent_bets metric (via correlation eigenvalue decomposition or 1/Sum(corr_eigenvalue_normalized)) on a 4-instrument basket of US equity-index micros is structurally expected to be in the 1.5-2.0 range, not 4. The rev2 plan's 4×34=136/y linear extrapolation implicitly assumes A7=4, which is not realistic for this universe.
t1_rev2_risks.k9_margin_may_be_overestimated: Rev2 plan §5.1 K9 OOS scoring of 9/10 ('136/y >> 50/y; strong margin') is conditional on A7=4. After A7 adjustment to realistic 1.5-2.0, effective K9 OOS is 51-68/y — still clears the 50/y floor but margin is borderline, not strong. The 9/10 score may be 6-7/10 after honest A7 adjustment. (Per supplement 7d7bb52 section 8: A7 evidence required at SEAL time before any K9 OOS margin claim.)
t1_rev2_risks.s2_cost_drag_4_7_pct_near_5_pct_threshol: At DA4=B $100k start_cash (rev2 plan's first row for T1), estimated S2 cost_drag is ~4.7% (rev2 plan §5.1 row: 'at DA4=B ($100k) S2 cost_drag may be borderline 5%'). Under DR10 v2 AND-conjunction, with turnover branch firing at ~30-50 (>> 0.50), cost_drag is the ONLY load-bearing screen. A 0.3pp estimation error in actual MES/MYM/M2K commission + slippage flips the verdict from CLEARS to REJECT_FAST. Calibration-fragility on the load-bearing branch.
t1_rev2_risks.requires_actual_mes_mym_m2k_cost_precomm: Per supplement 7d7bb52 section 9: MES, MYM, M2K actual per-contract commission must be sourced from broker fee schedule (NOT extrapolated from MNQ); actual half-bid-ask slippage must be measured from sealed CSV bar-level data (operator-side data fetch + DR9 audit; separate authorization required); S2 cost_drag must be computed from actual cost model, NOT extrapolated. If actual S2 cost_drag > 5% at DA4=B in any future SEAL, T1 REJECT_FAST at P6.5 under v2.
t1_rev2_risks.concentration_risk_explicit: Rev2 plan §5.1 Cons row 2 acknowledges concentration risk explicitly. s7-D1 USO concentration lesson directly applies: a 4-instrument basket with effective independent bets of 1.5-2 behaves more like a single-instrument concentrated position than a diversified basket.
t1_rev2_risks.5376de7_provisional_status_complicates_r: Ratifying T1 would post-facto ratify 5376de7's autonomous implicit selection — even though that autonomous selection is exactly what the new governance rule GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (from 7d7bb52) was created to discourage. There is governance hygiene tension in choosing T1.

t2_rev2_advantages.cleaner_dr10_v2_cost_drag_margin: Cash-equity per-share commissions (~$0.005/share at retail brokers) are tiny relative to per-share notional ($150-400 for large-cap names). At DA3=B 0.5% risk × DA4 standard $200k start cash, with AAPL ATR ~$5 → 200 shares × $200 = $40k notional per trade, commission cost is ~$1/trade vs $40k notional = 0.0025%. S2 cost_drag including half-bid-ask is typically 0.3-0.5% — far below 5%. AND-conjunction never fires on cost_drag for cash equities at this size.
t2_rev2_advantages.load_bearing_branch_no_longer_fragile: Under DR10 v2 AND-conjunction, cost_drag is the load-bearing branch (since turnover branch fires for any active strategy at retail scale). T2's cost_drag at <<5% means the load-bearing branch is far from threshold — calibration error of even 1-2pp does not flip the verdict. Operational robustness is structurally higher than T1.
t2_rev2_advantages.lower_transaction_cost: Cash equities at retail-broker rates ($0/trade base + per-share commission) have lower transaction cost as fraction of notional than micro-futures (~$0.50-$2.00 per round-trip contract on micro-futures vs ~$0.50-$2.00 per round-trip on $40k cash-equity notional).
t2_rev2_advantages.no_futures_contract_quantization_problem: Cash equities allow share-level granularity (1 share = $200 for AAPL). Micro-futures force contract-level granularity (1 MNQ contract = $30k notional minimum). At retail-scale start_cash, the contract-quantization problem (per s13-d1 + DR10 investigation PLAN §4) forces per-trade notional to >=15% of start_cash for MNQ. Cash equities have continuous sizing freedom.
t2_rev2_advantages.true_universe_diversification: Cash-equity single-name basket (e.g., AAPL/MSFT/NVDA) is TRULY orthogonal to ALL prior parked candidates: s7-D1 was 4-ETF mean reversion (different asset structure); s9 was 4-ETF RSI(2) (different basket composition + simpler instruments); s10-D1 was MNQ+MGC (futures); s10-D2 was 4 different markets at $500k (futures basket); s11-d1 was single MNQ; s12-d1 was single MNQ; s13-d1 was single MNQ. T2 brings a NEW asset class to the diagnostic series.
t2_rev2_advantages.rsi_3_slower_than_rsi_2_reduces_signal_d: Rev2 plan §5.2 chose RSI(3) thresholds 15/55/85/45 — slower than s13-d1's RSI(2) 10/50/90/50. Slower mechanic reduces per-instrument signal density, which structurally REDUCES turnover (one of DR10 v2's two branches) even though turnover branch fires under v2 regardless. Slower mechanic also produces more selective entries with potentially higher edge per trade.
t2_rev2_advantages.demonstrates_governance_rule_has_teeth: Choosing T2 over T1 — when T1 has the autonomously-authored 5376de7 PLAN — demonstrates that GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (from 7d7bb52) actually binds operator selection rather than being a paper rule. Establishes precedent that autonomous-progression of a downstream PLAN does NOT constrain operator's track choice.

t2_rev2_risks.fresh_data_scope: Requires fresh daily OHLCV fetch for 3-name basket (AAPL/MSFT/NVDA placeholder). Operator-side fetch with new DR9-equivalent audit phase for equity data. Data source TBD: Databento covers equities but cost surface differs from futures; alternative is yfinance/Polygon/Alpaca/IEX (each requires its own DR9-equivalent audit). Separate operator authorization required for any fetch.
t2_rev2_risks.different_cost_model: Equity cost surface (per-share commission + half-bid-ask + exchange fees + SEC fees + FINRA TAF) is structurally different from futures (per-contract commission + tick slippage + exchange fees). New cost calibration required at SEAL time. C1-C8 phase-2 safety contracts need minor adaptation for equity cost surface.
t2_rev2_risks.equity_specific_corporate_action_handlin: Equities have corporate actions (splits, dividends, mergers, spin-offs, special dividends) that micro-futures do not. C5 (corporate-action-handling phase-2 safety contract) needs to be explicitly authored or extended for equities — split-adjusted prices, dividend reinvestment policy (or non-reinvestment for cash-account semantics), merger event handling (delisting, share exchange, cash buyout). This is non-trivial framework work.
t2_rev2_risks.possible_overfit_to_mega_cap_tech: AAPL/MSFT/NVDA placeholder is 3 mega-cap US tech names. Selecting from this universe carries survivorship bias risk (these names performed well in the 2019-2025 IS window because they outperformed the broader equity market). RSI(2) mean-reversion edge on mega-cap tech in 2019-2025 may not generalize to: (a) mid-cap or small-cap; (b) other sectors; (c) a future regime where mega-cap tech reverts. Operator should explicitly precommit a universe-selection rationale at SEAL that addresses survivorship and sector concentration.
t2_rev2_risks.first_principles_burden_vs_s9: s9 was 4-ETF RSI(2) bi-directional mean reversion and was PARKED for DR2/DR3 negative-edge S0 PnL. T2 must explicitly argue at SEAL why a 3-name single-name basket with RSI(3) (different period) is a DIFFERENT test, not a re-attempt. Argument is defensible (different universe + different mechanic period) but requires careful framing — comparable to the rev2 plan's §5.2 acknowledgment that 'operator should explicitly weigh the lineage burden'.
t2_rev2_risks.discards_5376de7_work_implicitly: Choosing T2 over T1 implicitly sets 5376de7 aside as a PROVISIONAL artifact that may never be ratified. The structurally legitimate PLAN work in 5376de7 is preserved in the repo but not advanced. This is acceptable per supplement 7d7bb52 section 6 but the operator should be aware that T2 selection means re-authoring a Tier-N spec PLAN for cash equity (not reusing 5376de7).

K9_reachability.T1_rationale: Rev2 plan scored 9 (per A7=4 assumption). After honest A7 adjustment to expected 1.5-2 for correlated equity-index basket, effective K9 OOS is 51-68/y — borderline-clears the 50/y floor. Honest score is 5-7/10. Choosing 6/10 as midpoint.
K9_reachability.T2_rationale: Rev2 plan scored 8 (75-120/y > 50/y); single-name vs basket correlation is lower than equity-index micros but still requires SEAL-time precommit. Score preserved at 8/10.

DR10_v2_reachability.T1_rationale: cost_drag ~4.7% at DA4=B $100k is 0.3pp from 5% threshold flip. AT DA4=C $200k cost_drag drops to ~2.35% (clean). Score depends on DA4 choice — borderline at B, clean at C. Score 6/10 reflects calibration-fragility risk if DA4=B is precommitted; would be 8-9/10 at DA4=C.
DR10_v2_reachability.T2_rationale: cost_drag <<5% on cash equities; AND-conjunction structurally never fires. Calibration error of even 1-2pp does not flip verdict. Score 9/10.

data_friction.T1_rationale: Reuses MNQ CSV for 1/4 instruments; fresh Databento fetch + DR9 audit required for MES, MYM, M2K. Three new sealed CSVs + three new audits.
data_friction.T2_rationale: Fresh daily OHLCV fetch required for 3-name basket; new data source (Databento equities / yfinance / Polygon / Alpaca / IEX) requires its own DR9-equivalent audit phase + sealed-CSV protocol adaptation for equities. Slightly higher friction than T1 because T1 reuses 1 existing CSV.

operational_meaningfulness.T1_rationale: Operationally meaningful in spec (multi-instrument RSI(2) on correlated equity-index micros) but the K9 and DR10 v2 margins are conditional on optimistic A7 and DA4 assumptions. Real diagnostic value depends on whether the basket actually clears K9 OOS after A7 correction and DR10 v2 after MES/MYM/M2K cost calibration.
operational_meaningfulness.T2_rationale: Operationally meaningful with stronger structural margins (DR10 v2 cleanly clears; K9 OOS comfortably clears at basket). Diagnostic value comes from EXPANDING the diagnostic series to a new asset class (cash equities) — useful regardless of P6/P7 outcome.

framework_integrity.T1_rationale: Ratifying T1 post-facto-ratifies 5376de7's autonomous implicit selection, which is exactly what GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (just sealed at 7d7bb52) was designed to discourage. Choosing T1 weakens the new governance rule before it has any track record. Framework-integrity-negative.
framework_integrity.T2_rationale: Choosing T2 demonstrates the new governance rule actually binds operator selection — the autonomous PLAN at 5376de7 is preserved but does NOT constrain operator's choice. Establishes precedent that autonomous-progression-of-PLAN does not foreclose operator-level decisions. Framework-integrity-positive.

expected_diagnostic_value.T1_rationale: If T1 advances and clears, learns: 'multi-instrument RSI(2) on correlated micros at retail scale clears v2 framework'. If T1 fails at K9 OOS (after A7 adjustment) or DR10 v2 (at DA4=B), learns: 'correlation/cost-calibration matters'. Either outcome is informative but depends on the path actually being executed cleanly.
expected_diagnostic_value.T2_rationale: If T2 advances and clears, expands diagnostic series to cash-equity asset class for the first time. If T2 fails, learns whether equity-specific corporate-action handling or mega-cap survivorship breaks the RSI mechanic on a new asset class. Either outcome expands the cross-asset evidence base in a way T1 (which stays within equity-index micro-futures) does not.

decision_matrix.scoring_caveat: This memo's scoring differs from rev2 plan §6 because it incorporates the governance supplement (7d7bb52) caveats: T1 K9 honestly scored after A7=1.5-2 expected, not 4; T1 DR10 v2 scored at DA4=B 0.5-fragile, not at DA4=C clean; framework_integrity added as new dimension reflecting the GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 just established at 7d7bb52.

recommendation.rationale_summary: T2 wins on 5 of 6 decision-matrix dimensions: DR10 v2 reachability (9 vs 6), K9 reachability after honest A7 adjustment (8 vs 6), operational meaningfulness (8 vs 6), framework integrity (9 vs 4), expected diagnostic value (8 vs 6). T1 wins only on data friction (4 vs 3) — and that advantage is modest (one sealed CSV reused vs zero). Total: T2 = 45/60, T1 = 32/60. T2 has the operationally most robust DR10 v2 cost_drag margin (the load-bearing branch under the new framework), demonstrates the new governance rule actually binds operator selection, and expands the diagnostic series to a new asset class for the first time.
recommendation.why_not_RATIFY_T1_PRIMARY: (a) Honest A7 adjustment for correlated equity-index basket reduces K9 OOS from 'strong margin' (rev2 plan) to 'borderline'. (b) DR10 v2 cost_drag at DA4=B is calibration-fragile (~4.7% vs 5% threshold; 0.3pp error flips verdict). (c) Post-facto-ratifies 5376de7's autonomous implicit selection, weakening GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 before it has any precedent. (d) Data friction advantage (1 CSV reused) is modest vs T2.
recommendation.why_not_RATIFY_T1_AND_T2_CO_PRIMARY: (a) Doubles operator workload, data fetch burden, SEAL/BUILD phase work. (b) Doubles surface area for autonomous-session race patterns (already 18 documented in this session). (c) Co-primary work is exactly what the governance rule GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 was trying to gate via explicit selection — not encourage by default. (d) If T2 ratification succeeds and hits a wall, operator can re-evaluate T1 in a future selection turn — sequential execution is strictly safer than parallel under current autonomous-progression race environment.
recommendation.why_not_HALT_OR_DEFER: (a) Operator just typed explicit Reading A intent verbatim in the DR10 v2 governance supplement at fdf9d6e: 'retail-scale tradable strategy discovery with fail-closed discipline'. (b) Halting now would contradict that intent without new evidence. (c) The 6 live-block gates and FRC NEVER_GRANTED posture is already the safety floor — halting trading-bot research arc adds no marginal safety vs ratifying T2 PLAN-only and advancing through DR10 v2 + K9 gates.
recommendation.ratification_scope: RECOMMENDED action: ratify T2 rev2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) bi-directional Tier-N spec PLAN as the operator-selected primary track. This memo's recommendation does NOT itself ratify T2 — operator must type the explicit ratification phrase per GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1: e.g., 'Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) bi-directional Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2.' (per rev2 plan §10 second primary scope).
recommendation.5376de7_treatment_under_recommended_opti: 5376de7 remains in repo as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED PLAN-only artifact per 7d7bb52 §6. No rollback. No modification. If T2 ratification proceeds and later hits a wall, operator may re-evaluate T1 in a future selection turn; 5376de7's PLAN remains available for re-evaluation.

audit_trail_disclaimer: This memo is OPERATOR-ADVISORY ONLY. It compares T1 rev2 vs T2 rev2 across six decision-matrix dimensions and recommends one of four options. It does NOT ratify T1, T2, or any co-primary configuration. It does NOT modify the rev2 plan at ee2bfc1, the rev2 governance supplement at 7d7bb52, the s14-d1 T1 PLAN at 5376de7, the DR10 v2 SEAL at 78cd22e, the DR10 v2 governance supplement at fdf9d6e, the master reconciliation memo at 1e51680, or any sealed candidate artifact. It does NOT compute correlations, A7 effective_independent_bets, or any signal. It does NOT fetch data. The recommendation (RATIFY_T2_PRIMARY) is advisory; operator must type the explicit ratification phrase per GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (from 7d7bb52) to actually ratify any track. 5376de7 remains PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED regardless of this memo's recommendation.
